summary: I am a Cloud & AI leader passionate about building scalable, secure, and intelligent systems on Amazon Web Services. With deep experience in cloud architecture, governance, and enterprise transformation, I focus on translating business problems into production-ready AWS solutions. My current work spans AI, Generative AI, and Agentic systems — designing real-world applications using services such as Amazon Bedrock, serverless architectures, and data platforms. I actively work at the intersection of: Enterprise cloud governance (multi-account strategy, landing zones, security guardrails) AI & Generative AI enablement Agentic AI system design and orchestration Scalable data and platform engineering I enjoy mentoring teams, driving cloud adoption journeys, and building communities that make emerging technologies practical and accessible. My mission: Turn AI ambition into secure, scalable, real-world impact.
